login._status: Confirmed from screenshot - using label-based selectors since exact field IDs weren't visible. If these fail when actually run, use browser Inspect on the User ID field to get its exact id/name and swap in below.

step1_claimHeader._note: Member ID field triggers an async postback on blur that auto-populates Last Name / First Name / Birth Date. Must wait for this before reading validation state or clicking Continue.
step1_claimHeader._knownValidationTrap: Transport Certification radio defaults to 'No' on some page loads even after being set — screenshots showed this causing a silent block on Continue. Always explicitly re-check the Yes radio state right before clicking Continue.

step2_diagnosisAndServiceLines._status: INCOMPLETE below this point - need screenshots of service line section (procedure code, service dates, units, charge amount) and whatever comes after (Step 3? final Submit page?)

step3_serviceDetails._status: PLACEHOLDER RATES - DO NOT USE ON A REAL SUBMISSION until verified against actual HCPF fee schedule.

mileage.description: Mileage, non-ambulance, non-wheelchair van, per mile

step3_serviceDetails._warning: These $20 base / $2 per mile figures are PLACEHOLDERS ONLY, invented to complete the automation build. Before running against any real account, replace with your friend's actual historical billed rates (check Search Claims / Payment History) or HCPF's published fee schedule.

businessRules.payer: Always 'Title XIX Payer' - no other option used for NEMT Medicaid claims
businessRules.signatureOnFile: Always 'Yes' if passenger signature was captured in RedArt trip form
businessRules.patientNumber: Use RedArt's internal trip UUID or passenger record ID - provider-assigned, not a state field
businessRules.diagnosisCode: MUST come from trip referral/authorization data, not invented. Fallback R68.89 (Other general symptoms and signs) only acceptable for non-specific NEMT trips where no diagnosis was provided - confirm this is acceptable practice, do not assume.
businessRules.memberIdMissing: If passenger only has last-4-SSN + DOB (no Medicaid Member ID captured), trip must be flagged 'pending-eligibility-lookup' and held out of the automated submission queue. Do NOT attempt submission without a real Member ID - it is a required field and will fail validation.
businessRules.scopeRestriction: The robot ONLY fills fields explicitly confirmed and listed in this config: Payer, Member ID, Patient Number, Date Type, Date of Current, Transport Certification, Signature on File, Diagnosis Type, Diagnosis Code. It must NOT touch, guess, or auto-fill any other field - Referring Provider ID, Supervising Provider ID, Service Facility Location ID, Address/City/State/Zip, Accident Related Reason, Previous Claim ICN, Note, or Include Other Insurance all stay untouched/blank unless explicitly added to this config later.
